plainEnglishRule: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel may not be promoted or repaired by overlay. Each translation must be compared against its own source witness. A source-missing translation lane is an allowed absence; synthetic text is forbidden.

DRB.note: Douay-Rheims raw Esther includes Catholic Esther form and must be mapped before any active text comparison or import.

NABRE.note: Historical NABRE Esther source is present. It must be compared in its own source form rather than forced into the active NRSV addition grid.

KJV.note: Historical KJV source uses the ordinary Esther file path, not an Additions_to_Esther underscore path.

NRSV.note: Active Greek Esther claims NRSV text, but no independent local NRSV source witness has been bound.

DRB.note: Douay-Rheims raw Daniel includes Catholic/extended Daniel material and must be mapped before any active text comparison or import.

NABRE.note: Historical NABRE Daniel source is present. The separate current Daniel 11 snapshot is not itself a Greek Daniel source witness.

KJV.note: Historical KJV Daniel material is split across ordinary Daniel plus separate apocryphal addition files. The exact source paths use spaces, not underscores.

NRSV.note: Active Greek Daniel claims NRSV text, but no independent local NRSV source witness has been bound.

nextRequiredWork: Bind or acquire the NRSV source witness for active Greek Esther.
Bind or acquire the NRSV source witness for active Greek Daniel.
Create a comparison plan that maps DRB, NABRE, KJV, and NRSV source forms without changing Bible text.
Only after source binding, run exact text collation for active NRSV Greek Esther and active NRSV Greek Daniel.
